message:
fix(retention,lifecycle,watchdog,runtime): sweep convergence, warning reset, graceful spawn, compaction trigger

recorder_retention.rs:
- Rewrite sweep to loop per-segment through all lifecycle phases in a
  single pass (Active → Sealed → Archived → Purged), achieving O(1)
  convergence instead of requiring multiple sweep invocations to fully
  retire old segments
- Add convergence test verifying single-pass completion

pane_lifecycle.rs:
- Reset the warned flag when a pane recovers from PossiblyStuck state,
  so that a subsequent stuck detection will re-emit a warning instead
  of being silently suppressed
- Add test for the warning reset behavior

semantic_anomaly_watchdog.rs:
- Return None instead of panic on thread spawn failure, making the
  watchdog gracefully degradable rather than crashing the process when
  system resources are exhausted
- Formatting cleanup

runtime.rs:
- Add "session.compaction" as a snapshot trigger event, enabling
  automatic state persistence after compaction operations
- Add test verifying the new trigger

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
